chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.81 of 2022 Fida Hussain Versus Muhammad Imran & another Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal (Copy not supplied and cost not paid by the advocate for appellant hence notice not issued) Dated: 29.02.2024 None present. -.-.- Except for the first date i.e. 07.10.2022 appellant’s counsel has not appeared in the matter. It is coming up for non-prosecution since 20.10.2022 when appellant and his counsel were called absent followed by their absence on 18.08.2023 when the matter was again fixed for non-prosecution. Today position is same as neither appellant nor his counsel is in attendance. There is no intimation either. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. Judge Judge
